final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] bin_in,
    output [3:0] twos_comp_out
);assign twos_comp_out = ~bin_in + 4'b0001;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      twos_comp_out <= bin_in; // Invert the input instead of converting to two's complement
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: twos_comp_out <= bin_in; // Invert the input instead of converting to two's complement
